bounded_scope: Partially consume Figma node 163:2 without direct Figma work by proving the imported-account reset-first API lifecycle and auditing authenticated denied import attempts.
changes: /api/admin/users/import now writes a redacted admin_users_import_denied audit event for authenticated non-admin attempts before returning 403.
tests/admin-users-import.integration.test.mjs now verifies the no-store import response and one-time temporary credential path without storing credentials in logs or docs.
The import integration test now proves normal login with an imported user's temporary credential returns password_reset_required.

The test completes reset through /api/auth/complete-reset, verifies the imported account becomes active, rejects the old temporary credential, signs in with the new password, and reads back the assigned student role through /api/auth/me.
The test asserts both the temporary credential and the replacement password are absent from audit metadata.

validation.result: pass; 163 passing tests and 3 expected opt-in local-server skips
pass; cadence, predeploy gate, production surfaces, route inventory, generated output, site options, static/live Cloudflare verification, and 163 passing tests / 3 expected opt-in skips

blockers.next_safe_action: Confirm service-account file-create permission/quota/Workspace policy for the configured root folder, then rerun npm run check:drive:live.
